name: PIMMIE · OVO / Starstruck — Website overhaul (development) · Invoice

content.title: PIMMIE · OVO / Starstruck
content.subtitle: Website overhaul · Creative direction + development (invoice)
content.body:
This document is the client-facing invoice and scope record for work on PIMMIE’s official web presence with OVO / Starstruck — application approach and investment, without a fixed delivery timeline in this deck.

Payment is due for work already completed ($1,500). We can add the content editor for an additional $1,000.

Visual direction can track the shared creative deck and label assets; staging and launch timing stay coordinated with management and release milestones.

content.title: Brand system — web treatment
content.subtitle: Lock-ups, type, and digital consistency

gridItems.label: Logos / lock-ups
gridItems.value: Use approved OVO / Starstruck and artist lock-ups consistently across the site; any web-specific variants confirmed during discovery with final brand files.

gridItems.label: Typography
gridItems.value: Heading and body families follow label and campaign guidelines; exact cuts and tracking to be pulled from source Figma or design PDFs.

gridItems.label: Color & imagery
gridItems.value: Hex/RGB from approved palettes; photography and cover art treated at high resolution with clear crops per breakpoint.

content.body: Confirm final swatches and export specs in Figma or source files wherever PDFs use raster-only swatches.

content.title: Creative pillars — website experience
content.subtitle: Motion, immersion, and artist world

gridItems.label: Motion-first
gridItems.value: Prioritize motion and depth over static grids where campaign assets support it — performance and reduced-motion fallbacks included.

gridItems.label: Landing direction
gridItems.value: Hero and navigation patterns that feel cinematic and on-brand; mobile-first layout with clear CTAs to music and video.

gridItems.label: Music & video
gridItems.value: Discography and video surfaces that highlight artwork and visuals — immersive browsing beyond a flat grid where it serves the story.

content.body: On-site playback or smartlink handoff can be tuned per track; embeds and third-party scripts stay lean for load time and consent.

content.title: Moodboard & consistency
content.subtitle: Creative lift across digitals
content.body:
The site should align with PIMMIE’s current visual era — elevating existing assets with layout, motion, and typography rather than recycling generic templates.

Digital type and campaign choices should stay cohesive with singles, videos, and cover art as they roll out.

gridItems.label: Exploration A
gridItems.value: Bold hero with layered motion or film-style treatment — subject to approved assets.

gridItems.label: Exploration B
gridItems.value: Spatial, editorial layouts for music and video — scroll-driven reveals where appropriate.

content.title: Recommended application stack
content.subtitle: Grounded in modern static sites — final choices confirmed in discovery
content.body: A fast SvelteKit frontend keeps one codebase for the overhaul, with static or edge hosting and optional headless content if the team needs frequent updates without deploys.

gridItems.label: Content
gridItems.value: Structured data in-repo or a headless CMS if editorial workflow warrants it — scoped in discovery.

gridItems.label: Frontend
gridItems.value: SvelteKit + Vite — SSR/SSG, progressive enhancement for embeds and reduced-motion preferences.

gridItems.label: Delivery
gridItems.value: Staging + production on static or edge hosting (e.g. Cloudflare Pages); Git handoff at milestones.

content.title: Discovery — outcomes to confirm
content.subtitle: Before locking build scope and launch timing
content.body: Use this checklist in workshops so motion, IA, and rollout gates match what ships.

gridItems.label: Hero & motion
gridItems.value: Hero treatment — asset format, loop length, performance budget, and reduced-motion fallback.

gridItems.label: Music & video IA
gridItems.value: Discography and video layouts; on-site player vs. outbound links; grid vs. immersive patterns per breakpoint.

gridItems.label: CMS vs. Git
gridItems.value: Who updates copy and artwork post-launch; whether editorial needs warrant a headless CMS vs. structured repo updates.

gridItems.label: Rollout gate
gridItems.value: What ships in staging vs. public; comms checklist with label.

gridItems.label: Analytics & embeds
gridItems.value: Smartlinks, mailing list, and third-party scripts — consent and performance.

content.title: Investment & payment
content.subtitle: Invoice for work completed; optional content editor add-on

tableRows.Engagement: Pimmie site — work completed to date
tableRows.What's covered: Development and delivery completed so far under the agreed engagement — per statement of work / invoice
Editor interface so the team can update copy and media without deploys — scoped and wired to the build
Extra pages/features, large CMS expansion, or work outside what we lock — scoped before build
Optional monthly retainer after launch — updates, monitoring, small fixes as agreed

content.body: The base invoice is $1,500 for work already done. If you want the content editor, we’ll add it for $1,000 on top of that. Anything else outside the locked scope is quoted before we start.

content.title: Scope highlights
content.subtitle: What this engagement covers when aligned to this invoice
content.body: Immersive home and inner pages that reflect PIMMIE’s current visual era; motion-aware storytelling with accessible fallbacks; discography and video surfaces that feel premium on mobile and desktop; integration with smartlinks and embeds as scoped; staging for label review before launch — aligned to the engagement and payment terms here (content editor available as the optional +$1,000 add-on).

gridItems.label: Configuration
gridItems.value: Clear split between design-approved tokens (type, color, motion) and implementation in code.

gridItems.label: Empty states
gridItems.value: Graceful handling when promo assets are staged for later announcement.

gridItems.label: Handoff
gridItems.value: Repository access, deploy notes, and README or CMS handoff depending on content model.
